ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "ir_data" REAL /* Infrared data captured by the sensor */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading from the sensor */,
  "x_location" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the sensor's location */,
  "y_location" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the sensor's location */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the data entry */,
  "attachment_tries" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made to attach the data */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected */,
  "collection_interval" INTEGER /* Time interval at which data is collected from the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_by" INTEGER /* User who installed the sensor */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for maintaining the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_name FOREIGN KEY ("location_name") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being logged */,
  "attempt_time" INTEGER /* Time when the attachment attempt was made */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the attachment was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the attachment failed */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
